text: Subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka notification dekhte hi meri aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur main wahi metro station pe baith kar rone laga. Papa ke operation ke liye saari savings wiped ho gayi hain aur remittance bhi nahi bhej pa raha, is waqt mera dimaag bilkul blank hai. Main koi solution ya bank se baat karne ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa raha, bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai.

Bank se kist bounce hone ka message aaya aur main is anjaan shehar mein akele baith kar kaanpne laga. Mummy ke hospital bills bharne ke liye gaon ki zameen aur chit fund ka paisa tak laga diya, phir bhi ye debt spiral khatam nahi ho raha. Language gap ki wajah se yahan kisi ko dard bata nahi sakta, bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon.

Medical expense spiral ne humein road par la diya hai aur aaj EMI bounce hone par main bas sunn hokar screen ko takta raha. Gaon mein kisan baap ko kya mooh dikhaunga, ye soch kar dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai aur rone ka control nahi ho raha. Is waqt career ya agla kadam dimaag mein nahi aa raha, bas ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe saans nahi lene de raha.

Aaj bank se call aaya ki loan default ho gaya hai aur main wahi sadak pe baith gaya, mujhse baat bhi nahi kari ja rahi. Metro city mein akele reh kar ye zillat dekh kar dimaag sunn ho chuka hai aur bas wahi hospital ke bills dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain. Main koi backup plan ya financial help nahi soch sakta, bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main khota ja raha hoon.

Bhai ke accident mein saari jama-poonji chali gayi aur ab bank ka bounce alert dekh kar mera dum ghutne laga hai. Sahukaar ka karz pehle se tha aur ab ye notification dekh kar main bilkul breakdown kar gaya hoon aur dimaag blank hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur darr lag raha hai ki sab kuch bikhar jayega.
